message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #333333
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontColor #333333
skinparam classMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classMethodPadding 5
skinparam classMethodSpacing 2
skinparam classMethodSeparatorColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classMethodSeparatorThickness 1
skinparam classMethodSeparatorStyle solid
skinparam classMethodSeparatorAlignment left
skinparam classMethodSeparatorPadding 0
skinparam classMethodSeparatorSpacing 0
skinparam classMethodSeparatorFontColor #333333
skinparam classMethodSeparatorFontSize 10
skinparam classMethodSeparatorFontStyle plain
skinparam classMethodSeparatorAlignment left
skinparam classMethodSeparatorPadding 0
skinparam classMethodSeparatorSpacing 0
skinparam classMethodSeparatorFontColor #333333
skinparam classMethodSeparatorFontSize 10
skinparam classMethodSeparatorFontStyle plain

class AbstractProcess {
}

class AbstractTCPProcess {
  + requestObject : Request
  + tcpClient : TcpClient
  + networkStream : NetworkStream
  + encode : Encoding
  + socketObserver : SocketObserver
  + AbstractTCPProcess()
  + InitializeInstance(requestObject:Request, tcpClient:TcpClient, networkStream:NetworkStream, encode:Encoding, socketObserver:SocketObserver) : void
}

AbstractTCPProcess --|> AbstractProcess

note top of AbstractProcess
  C
end note

note top of AbstractTCPProcess
  A
end note

@enduml
